prerequisites: A Cart.com account (formerly AmeriCommerce) with admin access to your store.
A replication start date (start_date) marking the earliest data to sync.
For Single Store Access Token auth: an API application created in the Cart.com admin from which to generate an access token.
For Central API Router auth: provisioning credentials (user name, user secret, and site ID) obtained by contacting Cart.com support.

authMethods.name: Single Store Access Token
authMethods.summary: Authenticate against a single Cart.com store using a generated access token. Maps to the secret field credentials.access_token. Generate the token in the Cart.com admin under Tools > Apps & Addons > API Apps & Integrations by opening the Tokens icon next to your API application and creating a new token.

authMethods.name: Central API Router
authMethods.summary: Authenticate via the Central API Router using provisioning credentials. Maps to the secret fields credentials.user_name, credentials.user_secret, and credentials.site_id. Contact Cart.com support to provision these values; site_id identifies your store within the Central API Router.

setupSteps.title: Choose an authentication method
setupSteps.body: Decide between Single Store Access Token (one store) and Central API Router (provisioned, multi-store) auth. The credentials object you supply must match the chosen method's secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Single Store access token
setupSteps.body: If using Single Store auth, log in to the Cart.com admin and go to Tools > Apps & Addons > API Apps & Integrations. Open the Tokens icon next to your API application, create a new access token with the required scopes, and copy it into credentials.access_token.

setupSteps.title: Obtain Central API Router credentials
setupSteps.body: If using Central API Router auth, contact Cart.com support to provision access. Use the supplied values to populate credentials.user_name, credentials.user_secret, and credentials.site_id.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Provide the required start_date field. The connector replicates records from this date onward, so set it to the earliest point in history you want to sync.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and verify the connection
setupSteps.body: Enter the credentials for your chosen method along with start_date, then test the connection to confirm the connector can authenticate against the Cart.com API.
